creator: peter@vereshagin.org
text:
I've seen the future Sylvio <= it is motto.
 
 I accept this.
 I use 0.14 for month or two as a developer, and considered this a minor upgrade till (1) someone will need this and (2) consensus will be found about FCGI::Spawn on FCGI::PM::MaxRequests' CPAN RT ticket I filed concerning FCGI::Spawn disadvantages mentio ned at that third-party POD.
 
 73! Peter
